_comment: Legit native FRAME uses (INVARIANT 1, verdict PASS_CONTAINER). A FRAME passes ONLY if it is a pure layout container: has layoutMode != NONE, has >=1 child, carries a semantic L2/L3 name, and does NOT carry a SAP component name. Everything else that is a FRAME/RECTANGLE standing in for a component is FAIL_FAKE_COMPONENT.
_forbiddenComment: A FRAME carrying one of these names is a fake stand-in for a REAL keyed SAP component → FAIL_FAKE_COMPONENT. DynamicPage/FilterPage etc. are intentionally NOT here: they are keyless layout wrappers (see keyless-components-allowlist.json layoutWrappers) and are built as native frames by design. Only names of components that HAVE a figmaComponentId belong here.
